creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 22 Oct 2009 17:38:22 GMT, James wrote: >>Organization: > > Via Networks Managed Hosting > >>Description: > > Via Networks Dedicated Hosting >

Via Networks provides a full range of dedicated and managed hosting > for many different environments. Providing customers with high quality > customer service and support, Via Networks does a great job at managed > and dedicated hosting. Hi James, First of all, thank you for taking the time to submit the text and for writing what appears to be a very good listing entry. The text is almost fine. It would be perfect if we also included information about Via Networks' location. Having said that, I have a small question about FreeBSD support. A quick look at the company's web site does not show any information about hosting FreeBSD systems though. I can see hosting solutions for Windows and Linux, but nothing related to BSD in general or FreeBSD in particular. Does Via Networks have any BSD-related hosting plans too? If yes, we would be very glad to add this company listing to our web site.
